name: Shepherd's Beef Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 ounces) frozen peas and carrots, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the diced cooked beef with the beef gravy.
2. Add the cooked peas and carrots to the mixture.
3. Stir in the grated Cheddar cheese until well combined.
4. Pour the hot filling into a casserole dish.
5. Make a ring of seasoned mashed potatoes around the edge of the casserole.
6. Bake in a preheated oven set to 400°F for about 20 minutes, or until heated through and the potatoes are golden brown. Turn off the heat when serving.
